prompt:
Tech architecture documentation diagram (intended use).
Scene: a clean light-gray background with generous spacing.
Subject: a microservices architecture flowchart.
Key details: centered top rounded-rectangle labeled exactly "API Gateway" in deep blue; three downward arrows fan out to three rounded-rectangles labeled exactly "Auth Service", "Order Service", "Payment Service" in teal; each service connects downward to a database cylinder labeled exactly "auth_db", "orders_db", "payments_db"; on the right, a separate rounded-rectangle labeled exactly "Message Queue (Kafka)" connected from each service by dotted arrows; SVG-style flat shapes, sharp sans-serif typography, no shadows.
Constraints: render labels verbatim, no other text, no watermark, no logos.
